beers.name: Checkerspot Star Spangled Pilsner
beers.description: This recreation of Baltimore's very own American Brewery's Pilsener from 1965 was brewed with beer historian Maureen O'Prey to celebrate 250 years of our country. Brewed based on their recipe using Wisconsin malt and Oregon noble-lineage hops, traditionally step mashed and using a clean lager yeast, this beer is crisp and refreshing.

beers.name: Harpoon Day Drifter
beers.description: Today’s Smoothest IPA – Hear that? That’s the sound of seagulls squabbling over the second half of your sandwich, the waves breaking along the shoreline, and the crack of your first IPA of the day. Utilizing an innovative nitro-dosing brew method, we ensure your first sip is as bright and smooth as your last, crafted for wherever the day takes you

Crisp Lager is handmade for easy drinking using only the finest malts, American noble hops and lager yeast in perfect balance for a brilliant golden beer that’s full-flavored, refreshing, and above all, Crisp Lager.

hops. Expect high notes of citrus flesh complimented with notes of fruit and a creamsicle finish.

beers.name: Oskare Blues Dale's American IPA
beers.description: This timeless American IPA is in the West Coast style – chock full of citrusy, herbal, and fresh pine notes that’ll renew your obsession with hops.

beers.name: Oxbow Infinite Darkness
beers.description: Infinite Darkness is a Belgian-style imperial stout brewed with European malts and fermented with a blend of Trappist and farmhouse yeast.

beers.name: Peabody Heights Attack From the 80's
beers.description: The 80’s are back! Utilizing Maris Otter, Pale Chocolate, and Crystal Oat malt along with a hefty base of roasted barley, the subtle chocolate and toffee notes come to the forefront of this classic style. Finishing off with a delicate roast that fades off the tongue, our aim was to stay true to style for one of the eras most popular beers.
